title: ouratea turnerae
intro: Ouratea turnerae, also known as Turnera, is a plant species native to Central and South America that belongs to the family Turneraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of menopause, including hot flashes and night sweats. Ouratea turnerae is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or capsule, and can be found in various herbal preparations, including supplements and tinctures.
